explanation_bullets: SBI Large Cap Fund: 1% exit load if redeemed within 365 days from the date of allotment.
SBI Flexicap Fund: Nil exit load.
SBI ELSS Tax Saver Fund: Nil exit load.
SBI Small Cap Fund: 1% exit load if redeemed within 18 months from the date of allotment.
SBI Midcap Fund: Nil exit load.
SBI Focused Equity Fund: Nil exit load.
